Package com.adrewdev.functional

Class MaybeAsync<T>

java.lang.Object
com.adrewdev.functional.MaybeAsync<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the contained value
public final class MaybeAsync<T> extends Object
Represents a future value that may or may not exist.

MaybeAsync is the asynchronous version of Maybe, wrapping a CompletableFuture that resolves to a Maybe value. It provides a 1:1 port of the TypeScript MaybeAsync type from typescript-functional-extensions.

A MaybeAsync is either:

  • Some(value) - contains a non-null value (wrapped in CompletableFuture)
  • None - represents the absence of a value (wrapped in CompletableFuture)

Example: 


 MaybeAsync<String> maybe = MaybeAsync.from(fetchUser(id))
     .map(user -> user.getEmail())
     .or("default@email.com");

 String email = maybe.toCompletableFuture().join().getValueOrThrow();
Author:
Ported from typescript-functional-extensions
See Also:
  • Maybe
  • CompletableFuture

  • Method Details

    • from

      public static <T> MaybeAsync<T> from(T value)
      Creates a MaybeAsync from a potentially null value.

      If the value is null, returns a MaybeAsync that resolves to None. Otherwise, returns a MaybeAsync that resolves to Some(value).

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the value
      Parameters:
      value - the value to wrap, may be null
      Returns:
      a MaybeAsync that resolves to Maybe.from(value)
      See Also:
      • some(Object)
      • none()

    • from

      public static <T> MaybeAsync<T> from(CompletableFuture<T> future)
      Creates a MaybeAsync from a CompletableFuture.

      The resulting MaybeAsync will resolve to Some(value) if the future completes successfully, or None if the future completes with an exception.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the value
      Parameters:
      future - the CompletableFuture to wrap (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a MaybeAsync that wraps the future
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if future is null
      See Also:
      • from(Supplier)

    • from

      public static <T> MaybeAsync<T> from(Supplier<T> supplier)
      Creates a MaybeAsync from a Supplier.

      The supplier is executed asynchronously using CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(). The resulting MaybeAsync will resolve to Some(value) if the supplier succeeds, or None if the supplier throws an exception.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the value
      Parameters:
      supplier - the supplier to execute asynchronously (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a MaybeAsync that resolves to Maybe.from(supplier.get())
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if supplier is null
      See Also:
      • from(CompletableFuture)

    • some

      public static <T> MaybeAsync<T> some(T value)
      Creates a MaybeAsync containing the given non-null value.

      Use this method when you know the value is non-null and want to explicitly create a Some instance.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the value
      Parameters:
      value - the non-null value to wrap
      Returns:
      a MaybeAsync containing Some(value)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value is null
      See Also:
      • from(Object)
      • none()

    • none

      public static <T> MaybeAsync<T> none()
      Returns a MaybeAsync representing the absence of a value.

      This returns a singleton instance - all calls to none() return the same MaybeAsync that resolves to Maybe.none().

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the MaybeAsync (inferred from context)
      Returns:
      a MaybeAsync that resolves to Maybe.none()
      See Also:
      • from(Object)
      • some(Object)

    • map

      public <U> MaybeAsync<U> map(Function<T,U> mapper)
      Transforms the contained value using the given function if present.

      If this MaybeAsync resolves to Some, applies the mapper function to the value and wraps the result in a new MaybeAsync. If this resolves to None, returns a MaybeAsync that resolves to None without calling the mapper.

      Type Parameters:
      U - the type of the transformed value
      Parameters:
      mapper - a function to apply to the value if present (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a MaybeAsync containing the result of applying the mapper, or None if this is None
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if mapper is null
      See Also:
      • bind(Function)
      • tap(Consumer)

    • bind

      public <U> MaybeAsync<U> bind(Function<T,MaybeAsync<U>> binder)
      Transforms the contained value using the given function that returns a MaybeAsync.

      Also known as "flatMap" or "chain". If this MaybeAsync resolves to Some, applies the binder function to the value and returns the resulting MaybeAsync. If this resolves to None, returns a MaybeAsync that resolves to None without calling the binder.

      Type Parameters:
      U - the type of the transformed value
      Parameters:
      binder - a function to apply to the value if present, returning a MaybeAsync (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a MaybeAsync containing the result of applying the binder, or None if this is None
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if binder is null
      See Also:
      • map(Function)
      • tap(Consumer)

    • tap

      public MaybeAsync<T> tap(Consumer<T> consumer)
      Executes the given consumer with the contained value if present.

      Useful for performing side effects on the value without transforming it. Returns a new MaybeAsync containing the same value.

      Parameters:
      consumer - a consumer to execute with the value if present (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a MaybeAsync containing the same value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if consumer is null
      See Also:
      • map(Function)
      • bind(Function)

    • match

      public <R> CompletableFuture<R> match(MaybeAsyncMatcher<T,R> matcher)
      Performs pattern matching on this MaybeAsync.

      Calls matcher.onSome(value) if this resolves to Some, or matcher.onNone() if this resolves to None.

      Type Parameters:
      R - the type of the result
      Parameters:
      matcher - a matcher providing callbacks for Some and None cases (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the result of calling the appropriate callback
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if matcher is null
      See Also:
      • MaybeAsyncMatcher
      • match(Consumer, Runnable)

    • match

      public CompletableFuture<Void> match(Consumer<T> some, Runnable none)
      Performs pattern matching on this MaybeAsync with void callbacks.

      Calls some.accept(value) if this resolves to Some, or none.run() if this resolves to None.

      Parameters:
      some - a consumer to execute with the value if this is Some (must not be null)
      none - a runnable to execute if this is None (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture that completes after the callback is executed
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if some or none is null
      See Also:
      • match(MaybeAsyncMatcher)

    • getValueOrThrow

      public CompletableFuture<T> getValueOrThrow()
      Gets the contained value if present, throws NoSuchElementException otherwise.

      The returned CompletableFuture will complete with the value if this MaybeAsync resolves to Some, or complete exceptionally with NoSuchElementException if it resolves to None.

      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the value
      See Also:
      • getValueOrThrow(Supplier)
      • #getValueOrDefault(Object)

    • getValueOrThrow

      public CompletableFuture<T> getValueOrThrow(Supplier<String> messageSupplier)
      Gets the contained value if present, throws NoSuchElementException with the provided message otherwise.

      The returned CompletableFuture will complete with the value if this MaybeAsync resolves to Some, or complete exceptionally with NoSuchElementException if it resolves to None.

      Parameters:
      messageSupplier - a supplier of the exception message (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if messageSupplier is null
      See Also:
      • getValueOrThrow()
      • #getValueOrDefault(Object)

    • or

      public MaybeAsync<T> or(T value)
      Returns this MaybeAsync if it resolves to a value, otherwise returns a MaybeAsync containing the given value.
      Parameters:
      value - the fallback value to return if this is None
      Returns:
      a MaybeAsync containing the original value if Some, or the fallback value if None
      See Also:
      • or(Supplier)
      • or(MaybeAsync)

    • or

      public MaybeAsync<T> or(Supplier<T> valueSupplier)
      Returns this MaybeAsync if it resolves to a value, otherwise returns a MaybeAsync containing the value supplied by the given supplier.

      The supplier is only invoked if this MaybeAsync resolves to None.

      Parameters:
      valueSupplier - a supplier of the fallback value (must not be null)
      Returns:
      a MaybeAsync containing the original value if Some, or the supplied fallback value if None
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if valueSupplier is null
      See Also:
      • or(Object)
      • or(MaybeAsync)

    • or

      public MaybeAsync<T> or(MaybeAsync<T> other)
      Returns this MaybeAsync if it resolves to a value, otherwise returns the given MaybeAsync.
      Parameters:
      other - the MaybeAsync to return if this is None (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this MaybeAsync if Some, other if None
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if other is null
      See Also:
      • orElse(MaybeAsync)
      • or(Object)

    • orElse

      public MaybeAsync<T> orElse(MaybeAsync<T> other)
      Returns this MaybeAsync if it resolves to a value, otherwise returns the given MaybeAsync.

      This is an alias for or(MaybeAsync) and behaves identically.

      Parameters:
      other - the MaybeAsync to return if this is None
      Returns:
      this MaybeAsync if Some, other if None
      See Also:
      • or(MaybeAsync)

    • toCompletableFuture

      public CompletableFuture<Maybe<T>> toCompletableFuture()
      Returns the underlying CompletableFuture.
      Returns:
      the CompletableFuture wrapping a Maybe
      See Also:
      • toMaybe()

    • toMaybe

      public Maybe<T> toMaybe()
      Converts to Maybe (blocking).

      This method blocks until the CompletableFuture completes. Use toCompletableFuture() for non-blocking access.

      Returns:
      the Maybe value (blocks until complete)
      See Also:
      • toCompletableFuture()

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Compares this MaybeAsync with another object for equality.

      Two MaybeAsync instances are equal if their underlying Futures complete with equal Maybe values.

      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - the object to compare with
      Returns:
      true if the MaybeAsync instances are equal, false otherwise

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code for this MaybeAsync.

      This method blocks until the CompletableFuture completes.

      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code of the underlying Maybe value

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this MaybeAsync.

      This method blocks until the CompletableFuture completes.

      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      "MaybeAsync{Some{value}}" if this is Some, "MaybeAsync{None{}}" if this is None
